narrative:
Springfield Twp I (precinct in Summit County) has 1,021 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
